prompt:
A luxury fashion illustration in Louis Vuitton advertisement style. A stylish young woman in side profile walking forward, holding a designer monogram handbag. Her face is soft, detailed, with short wavy black hair, natural makeup, slightly glossy lips, and subtle freckles. She wears a black high-neck top with a light beige elegant jacket and matching pleated pants. Minimal gold jewelry (small hoop earrings and a delicate necklace).

The artwork is semi-realistic illustration with clean line art and soft shading, high detail. Background is minimal white with a soft pastel gradient shadow silhouette behind her (blue fading into warm beige), including subtle luxury monogram pattern elements inside the shadow.

Centered composition, high-end editorial fashion aesthetic, modern, elegant, premium branding style. Add bold “LV” logo in center and “LOUIS VUITTON” text below in clean typography.

Soft lighting, smooth textures, refined color palette, ultra high quality.
